title: potentilla glandulosa f. hansenii
intro: Potentilla glandulosa f. hansenii, also known as Sticky Cinquefoil, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its sticky stems and leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of triterpenoids and other compounds. The health benefits associated with Potentilla glandulosa f. hansenii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
